mapper.select: SELECT id, patrol_name, request_method, request_url, request_headers, request_body, timeout, expected_status_code, expected_json_field, max_response_time, status, task_status, cron_expression, remark, create_time, update_time FROM api_patrol_config WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, patrol_name, request_method, request_url, request_headers, request_body, timeout, expected_status_code, expected_json_field, max_response_time, status, task_status, cron_expression, remark, create_time, update_time FROM api_patrol_config WHERE status = 1 AND task_status = 1 AND cron_expression IS NOT NULL AND cron_expression != '' ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE api_patrol_config SET patrol_name = #{patrolName}, request_method = #{requestMethod}, request_url = #{requestUrl}, request_headers = #{requestHeaders}, request_body = #{requestBody}, timeout = #{timeout}, expected_status_code = #{expectedStatusCode}, expected_json_field = #{expectedJsonField}, max_response_time = #{maxResponseTime}, status = #{status}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
